# Developer Intake: [Brief Title]

> Copy this file to `tasks/intake/` and fill in each section before handing off to Analyst.

## Goal

_What do you want to achieve? Describe the desired end state in plain language._

## Constraints

_Technical, business, time, or resource constraints that must be respected._

- 
- 

## Prior Attempts

_Describe any previous attempts at this problem, including what was tried and why it did not fully work._

## Desired Outcome

_What does success look like? Be as specific as possible — include observable behaviors, metrics, or deliverables._

## Priority

- [ ] Critical — blocks other work or a release
- [ ] High — important for the current sprint
- [ ] Normal — scheduled work
- [ ] Low — nice-to-have

## Additional Context

_Links to relevant RoadBoard tasks, decisions, specs, or external references._
